description.text: SafetyCulture is scaling its workplace-operations platform. You will lead design of high-throughput APIs in Go and Python, mentor a squad of six, and own reliability targets. Requirements: 8+ years backend experience, gRPC, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, and a track record of leading incident reviews.

Join realestate.com.au's data platform team building streaming pipelines on Kafka and dbt models on Snowflake. Requirements: 4+ years data engineering, strong SQL and Python, Airflow orchestration, and experience with infrastructure-as-code (Terraform).
